plugins.name: multi-ai-skills
plugins.description: Submit research prompts to 7 AI platforms simultaneously (Claude.ai, ChatGPT, Copilot, Perplexity, Grok, DeepSeek, Gemini), synthesise results, maintain capability comparison matrices, and produce landscape reports — all from Claude Code.
